messages.content:
✅ Locked 3 decisions:
- PR #227 HOLD (supersede by sidebar redesign)
- Tags: 10 max / 16 chars / freeform / per-project namespace
- Palette REVISION 3 (4 colors changed: open=blue / in_progress=yellow / closed=gray / reopened=sky)

Routed Dev backend (tags + duration + batch PATCH) + Dev2 FE (sidebar redesign + Edit Task modal + palette refresh) atomic. Tester2 pre-verify new palette distinctness first.

ETA ~3-5 hr team work atomic.

messages.content:
task 颜色改一下：| State | Color | Hex | 说明 |  
|---|---|---|---|  
| open | sky | `#0284c7` | 活跃待办，有存在感，区别于进行中的蓝 |  
| in_progress | blue | `#2563eb` | 主色调，经典"进行中" |  
| running | blue | `#2563eb` | 同 in_progress，语义相同 |  
| blocked | red | `#dc2626` | 强警示，比 orange 更紧迫 |  
| resolved | green | `#16a34a` | 完成=绿，全球通用认知 |  
| completed | green | `#16a34a` | 同 resolved |  
| verified | teal | `#0d9488` | 比 green 更"正式认证"，有区分度 |  
| closed | slate | `#64748b` | 归档终态，中性低调退场 |  
| discarded | zinc | `#3f3f46` | 比 closed 更深更暗，废弃感更强 |  
| reopened | amber | `#d97706` | 暖黄"重新注意"，不是错误但需关注 |
